style=\"edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#0050ef;\" edge=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry relative=\"1\" as=\"geometry\"><mxPoint x=\"0\" y=\"30\" as=\"sourcePoint\" /><mxPoint x=\"160\" y=\"30\" as=\"targetPoint\" /></mxGeometry></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 160, "h": 60, "aspect": "fixed", "title": "Rel: 1:1"}, {"xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\" /><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\" /><mxCell
